notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim hits a grand slam (9) to right field. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer scores. Carlos Cortes scores. Max Muncy scores.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Joe Mack. Zack Gelof scores. Lawrence Butler to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Javier Sanoja GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Zack Gelof to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Javier Sanoja out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Esteury Ruiz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz hit by pitch. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
